name: forge-monorepo
description: FORGE — Rust core, web face (D16). TS packages live in packages/*; the cargo workspace in crates/*.

scripts.codegen:contract: cargo run -q -p forge-validate -- schema --out schema/forge-modelspec.schema.json && node scripts/codegen-contract.mjs
scripts.bake:demo: cargo run -q -p forge-validate -- bake examples/vx2-mini.forge.json --out packages/studio/public/demo/vx2-mini.bake.json && cargo run -q -p forge-validate -- run examples/vx2-mini.forge.json --report packages/studio/public/demo/vx2-mini.report.json
